entries.title: claudius
entries.description: Collection of specialized development agents and skills for Claude Code

entries.title: gemini-manager
entries.description: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entries.title: agent-docs
entries.description: Agent skills for project documentation: scaffold an Astro 5 + Starlight docs site from an interview, generate portable SVG/PNG diagrams, and write house-style docs. Authored once in Claude-native form and emitted to Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Gemini.

entries.title: telegram-topics
entries.description: Telegram channel for Claude Code with Forum Topics — each project gets its own topic thread. Manage pairing, allowlists, and topic naming via plugin commands.

entries.title: narnia
entries.description: Session history explorer for GitHub Copilot CLI. Browse, search, and visualize your past coding sessions with a Blazor web UI and MCP server integration.

entries.title: gsd-core
entries.description: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entries.title: claude-subconscious
entries.description: A subconscious for Claude Code. A Letta agent watches your sessions, accumulates context, and whispers guidance back.

entries.title: agmo
entries.description: Optimized Claude Code plugin with 8 core agents, 30 demand-loaded skills, Obsidian-centered workflow

entries.title: memory-audit-plugin
entries.description: Audit a Claude Code project memory dir for rot: dangling index pointers, orphan files, unresolved [[links]], shipped/DONE archive candidates, oversize index, and frontmatter/slug issues. Read-only report; fixes are proposed for your approval. One slash command: /memory-audit.

entries.title: llm-externalizer
entries.description: MCP server that offloads bounded LLM tasks from Claude Code to cheaper local (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp) or remote (OpenRouter) models. Profile-based configuration with ensemble mode.

entries.title: claude-scholar
entries.description: Semi-automated research assistant for academic research and software development, with skills for literature review, experiments, analysis, writing, and project knowledge management

entries.title: claude-council
entries.description: Consult multiple AI coding agents (Gemini, OpenAI, Grok, Perplexity, plus codex and antigravity CLIs when installed) to get diverse perspectives on coding problems

entries.title: sarmalink-ai
entries.description: Skills for installing, configuring, and deploying SarmaLink-AI — open-source multi-provider AI assistant

entries.title: agentcorp
entries.description: AgentCorp: a multi-agent software-delivery pipeline as Agent Skills — task orchestration, planning, implementation, multi-reviewer code review, and layered verification.

entries.title: rune
entries.description: 64-skill mesh for Claude Code with runtime auto-discipline — native hooks (preflight/sentinel/completion-gate/quarantine) auto-fire before tool use. 203 sync connections + 40 async signals, adaptive routing, mesh analytics. Quarantine (L3) advises model to treat content from untrusted MCPs / WebFetch / upload Reads as data, not directives. Use rune:cook for any code task, rune:team for parallel work, rune:launch for deploy, rune:rescue for legacy code.

entries.title: team-skills-platform
entries.description: Role-based Team Skills platform with an ECC-style harness skeleton, specialist agents, layered rules, commands, hooks skeleton, and frontend governance.

entries.title: hotline
entries.description: Wires up the hotline MCP server so Claude Code sessions get the Telegram channel: reply, react, edit_message, and download_attachment tools plus inbound message relay. Requires the hotline binary on PATH (go install github.com/1broseidon/hotline@latest) and a configured bot token — see the README quickstart at https://github.com/1broseidon/hotline.

entries.title: agt-governance
entries.description: AGT governance hooks and MCP tools for Claude Code sessions

entries.title: hunch
entries.description: A git-native reasoning graph of decisions, bugs, and invariants for your codebase — queried and enforced at reasoning time. Adds the hunch_* MCP tools plus /hunch:capture, /hunch:heal, /hunch:why, /hunch:fix, /hunch:fragile.

entries.title: grok
entries.description: Delegate coding, review, and second opinion work to the local Grok CLI.

entries.title: wayfinder
entries.description: Wayfinder retirement-planning Agent Skills (create-plan, create-scenarios, retirement-advising) plus the hosted Wayfinder MCP server — build, stress-test, and get advice on plans (life-paths + Monte Carlo) with live data from your account.

entries.title: fusion
entries.description: Multi-model orchestration: tier agents, routing rules, a blind multi-model panel, and a model drift doctor.

entries.title: taskflow
entries.description: Multi-phase subagent orchestration for Codex: the taskflow_* MCP tools (run/list/show/verify/compile) plus a skill that routes multi-phase or fan-out work to them. The MCP server runs via npx (codex-taskflow) — no separate global install required.

entries.title: music-production
entries.description: Music production toolkit for Claude: melody seed composition (MIDI + WAV) for Logic Pro and Suno workflows. Skills accrue over time — install once, update forever.

entries.title: ketch
entries.description: Optional Claude Code integration for the ketch CLI: wires up the `ketch mcp serve` MCP server (search, code, docs, scrape, crawl) and installs the bundled ketch research skill. The CLI stays the zero-infrastructure path — this plugin is a convenience, never a prerequisite. Requires the ketch binary >= v0.10.0 on PATH: brew install 1broseidon/tap/ketch or go install github.com/1broseidon/ketch@latest.

entries.title: production-grade
entries.description: Enhances Claude Code from producing raw code into delivering production-ready systems. 14 specialized agents handle architecture, tested code, security audit, CI/CD, and documentation. Use for building apps/websites/services, adding features, hardening, deployment, testing, review, or architecture design.

entries.title: dreamdex-docs
entries.description: Grounded DreamDex documentation for trading, contracts, HTTP API, WebSocket API, CCXT, security, and audits.

entries.title: rfq-normalizer
entries.description: Normalize any vendor RFQ spreadsheet (xlsx/csv) into MTGI's canonical historical-import template. Auto-detects the header row and drops summary footers, extracts a clean MPN, splits free-text into five typed spec columns, preserves extra vendor columns, normalizes conditions, and fills drive specs with an offline part-number decoder engine (Brave web search as fallback) — emitting a per-cell provenance log and a needs-review report.

entries.title: together
entries.description: Communication and collaboration skills for Claude Code

entries.title: agentic-sdd
entries.description: Spec-Driven Development lifecycle with TDD and E2E testing. Ships lifecycle agents (spec, tdd, implement, e2e, review, refactor, architect) and stack experts (React, React Native, Node/Express/Fastify, NestJS, Next.js, C#/ASP.NET Core, Avalonia/XAML desktop, PostgreSQL, MongoDB), reusable skills, slash commands, and enforcing quality-gate hooks for clean, maintainable, scalable code. Cross-platform incl. macOS Apple Silicon.

entries.title: ppt-generator
entries.description: Auto-generate presentations in Claude Code. The MCP server owns prompts, output schemas, and deterministic post-processing (validation, layout, lint, HTML/PPTX render); the client generates the slide content via a prepare/ingest handshake — no server-side LLM. Ships ppt-outline / ppt-design / ppt-modify / ppt-visual-qa skills.

entries.title: guidelines
entries.description: Coding guidelines skill covering input validation, error handling, DDD structure, type safety, testing, and more.

entries.title: skypilot
entries.description: SkyPilot agent skill for launching cloud VMs, Kubernetes pods, and Slurm jobs across 25+ clouds

entries.title: zeus
entries.description: Issue→code→PR→review workflow as one family. Aligns on work as GitHub issues (propose decision docs/RFCs, investigate evidence-driven inquiries), then surfaces the branch as a reviewer-friendly PR (create-pr) — which reviews the diff and verifies the linked issue's contract before opening — drives it to mergeable (address-pr), and hands off to a reviewer (request-review). review-pr is the shared read-only review engine, auto-detecting a local pre-PR diff or an open PR; improve retrospects on the family. Skills share durable facts via a per-worktree journey.json and invoke each other by name through JSON contracts.

entries.title: agent-harness
entries.description: Production-grade engineering skills and agents for AI coding assistants, covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entries.title: repo-insight
entries.description: Deep architectural analysis of open-source projects with design insights and trade-off analysis

entries.title: hologit
entries.description: Skills for configuring and using hologit

entries.title: tmb
entries.description: TMB plugin — bro orchestrates swe + pr-reviewer across a task-close and a push gate, backed by an MCP server: a SQLite trajectory log plus a kuzu world model that helps agents understand and navigate complex codebases.

entries.title: nl-ez-plugin
entries.description: Branded Claude Code plugin for Ministerie van Economische Zaken en Klimaat (nl-ez). Composes Dutch government data intelligence (nl-gov-data MCP — Tweede Kamer, Rijksoverheid, KOOP, BWB, Wetgevingskalender, Rechtspraak, CBS, plus nl-issue-framing, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-tensions) with server-side branded document formatting (stromy-format) and markdown-canvas deliverable planning, over the nl-ez client-data brand overlay.

entries.title: pad
entries.description: A shared knowledge base for developers and AI agents. Provides slash commands to save, load, search, and brainstorm with project planning documents stored in Pad.

entries.title: llm-gateway
entries.description: Multi-LLM orchestration: delegate to Claude, Codex, and Gemini from a single interface with session management and async jobs.

entries.description: Claude Code 커스텀 스킬/커맨드 모음 플러그인

entries.title: product-playbook
entries.description: MUST use when the user wants to plan, strategize, validate, or scope a product or feature. Composable product-thinking lenses (JTBD, PR-FAQ, positioning, pre-mortem, RICE, North Star, MVP, GTM, and more) that snap to the outcome and blend when the situation needs it, from raw idea to dev handoff.

entries.title: dark-factory
entries.description: Commands for writing, auditing, and managing dark-factory specs, prompts, and scenarios

entries.title: hive-mind
entries.description: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code. SQLite-backed, MCP-compatible, semantic + FTS5 hybrid search. Cross-platform.

entries.title: spectra

entries.title: revolut-x

entries.title: github-twin
entries.description: Personal RAG over your GitHub history (commits, code, review comments), served to Claude Code over MCP. Tools: find_code, find_reviews, predict_review_outcome, house_rules, developer_profile, and related retrieval surface.

entries.title: humanize-kit
entries.description: AI pattern interrupter for Claude. Three skills — humanize, humanize-ig, voice-profiler — that build a voice fingerprint from your real writing and rewrite AI output to match it. Free + MIT. The free gateway to the paid Branded Mayhem skill lineup (https://brandedmayhem.com).

entries.title: context-bazaar
entries.description: A typed, discoverable knowledge bazaar for AI coding harness configurations with Solr-backed semantic search — skills, powers, workflows, prompts, and agents for Kiro, Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, and more.

entries.title: agentic-patterns
entries.description: Streams all 26 Claude Code lifecycle events (tool calls, permissions, subagents, compaction, sessions) into the @agentic-patterns/server dashboard for live observability, and ships the `build-on-agentic-patterns` skill (how to register + build agents on the framework). Pair with `ap playground`. See https://github.com/pattern-stack/agentic-patterns-ts/blob/main/docs/CLAUDE-CODE-PLUGIN-ACTIVATION.md for activation + troubleshooting.

entries.title: trace-mcp
entries.description: Framework-aware code intelligence MCP server. 60+ framework integrations, 81 languages, semantic search with Signal Fusion (BM25 + PageRank + embeddings + identity), refactoring tools (rename/move/extract/codemod), change-impact analysis, security scanning, and decision/session memory.

entries.title: dotnet-ai-toolkit
entries.description: 44+ Claude skills and 7 specialist agents that run on your real .NET code: EF Core query optimization, Minimal API & architecture scaffolding, xUnit/Testcontainers tests, JWT auth, OpenTelemetry, code review, security audits, and more. Built for modern .NET 10 / C# 14.

entries.title: total-recall
entries.description: Cross-session, cross-CLI memory for AI coding assistants. Mines transcripts from 10 supported CLI clients. Surfaces operator identity / decisions / bans / corrections / goals / voice via 26 MCP tools, 6 hooks (SessionStart signpost + SessionStart compact-restore + UserPromptSubmit retrieval + Stop/PostCompact re-index + PreCompact continuity-seed), 15 slash commands, and 3 skills. gte-modernbert hybrid recall; worktree-aware project scoping; post-compaction coding-continuity packet. Optional local-LLM refinement ([llm] extra, ollama, off by default). The operator becomes the source of truth; the model stops re-asking what they already told it.

entries.title: yandex-metrica

Works standalone; optionally link the identity to a verified human via Alien Network biometric SSO.

entries.title: vergil
entries.description: Shared hooks, skills, agents, and commands for all managed repositories in the vergil-tooling ecosystem.

entries.title: scriptorium
entries.description: Self-evolving agent layer for Claude Code. Armarium (persistence & sync), Scribe (self-authoring), and Corrector (self-review) tend a Canon-defined instance. Bring your own instance, or run `/scriptorium-init` to set one up.

entries.title: yutori
entries.description: Web monitoring (Scouts), deep research, and browser automation

entries.description: Multi-agent development pipeline simulating an engineering team: requirements analysis, technical design, module breakdown, TDD implementation, validation, code review, and fix cycles

entries.title: insane-search
entries.description: Platform-specific access strategies for AI agents — adaptively accesses blocked sites (X/Twitter, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Naver, Coupang, LinkedIn) without API keys. Phase 0→3 adaptive scheduler with curl_cffi TLS impersonation and auto dependency install.

entries.title: mergify
entries.description: Skills for the Mergify CLI: manage merge queues, stacked pull requests, Test Insights (flaky tests, quarantine), merge protections, and Mergify configuration directly from the terminal.

entries.title: camunda-migration
entries.description: Claude Code skills for migrating Camunda 7 projects to Camunda 8

entries.title: squid
entries.description: Opinionated engineering agent team with progressive-disclosure specs for Python / TypeScript / Go monorepos. Ships PA / SWE / Tester / PR Reviewer / On-Call sub-agents, /squid-plan / /squid-implement-task / /squid-implement-night pipelines, and a library of language/framework/infra specs that agents load on-demand.

entries.title: wb-plc
entries.description: Wiren Board controller skills — operate, configure, troubleshoot WB hardware via SSH and wb-cli.

entries.title: epic
entries.description: 3 commands + 19 auto-trigger skills + self-evolving agent harness. Less to remember, more automation.

entries.title: swe-workbench

entries.title: dev-pomogator

entries.description: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entries.description: Claude Code skills for general engineering workflows: collaborative PR review, durable multi-step planning, auditable quantitative analysis pipelines with independent fact-checking, and a repo-native task loop for capturing and processing follow-up work.

entries.description: Development agents, skills, hooks, and commands for Claude Code workflows

entries.title: skills
entries.description: Public OllyGarden AI skills for Rose and the broader ecosystem

entries.title: bd
entries.description: Agent skills for the bitdrift Capture mobile observability platform

entries.title: polygram
entries.description: Telegram integration for Claude Code that preserves the OpenClaw per-chat session model. Migration target for OpenClaw users. Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entries.title: openclaw-docs
entries.description: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entries.title: saferun-guard
entries.description: Runtime safety firewall for AI coding agents. Blocks dangerous commands and protects sensitive files before they execute.

entries.title: workmux-status
entries.description: Display Claude agent status in tmux window names via workmux

entries.title: truto
entries.description: Official plugin for Truto -- the unified API platform. Helps developers integrate with third-party tools using Truto's APIs.

entries.title: sdna
entries.description: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entries.title: discover
entries.description: Methodical 5-pass feature-discovery workflow on Claude Code's built-in Workflow engine: system mapping, bounded research, evidence-rule kill-testing, plan tournament, verified execution. No required dependencies; OMC/superpowers/Codex/Gemini are optional boosters.

entries.title: fosmvvm-generators
entries.description: FOSMVVM architecture generators for ViewModels, Fields, DataModels, ServerRequests, Leaf Views, and ViewModel Tests

entries.title: production-readiness
entries.description: Comprehensive production readiness audit — 75+ checks across 9 pillars: security & supply chain, visual QA, code quality, testing, error handling & observability, build, performance, accessibility (WCAG 2.2), and AI/LLM safety. Like having a senior engineer + QA tester do a final review before deploy.

entries.title: interactive-diagram
entries.description: Build beautiful, interactive technical diagrams (system / architecture / sequence / flow) as a single self-contained HTML file — pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS, no build step. Tabbed multi-view, pan / zoom / drag, connected-chain highlight, double-click pin, dark mode (Tokyo Night), overlap auto-fix, and SVG / PNG export. Plus a static, slide-ready platform-architecture poster mode with a built-in overflow / overlap audit, one-click auto-fix, and download-fixed-HTML.

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entries.title: techne
entries.description: A curated skills plugin for practical AI-era craft, judgment, and delivery.

entries.title: promptworld
entries.description: PromptWorld — the meta-compiler *World: a WrightMaster Engineer-CEO that has every skill plus a native subagent per component type (skill / mcp / harness / operating_system / prompt / team / workflow), and 7 PromptGym specialist AIOS agents, that compile / compose / publish prompt systems through the nomicon. Bundles the install-promptworld deploy WIZARD (the agent builds the docker image, boots the container running the Engineer-CEO + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, copies the Claude creds in, and hands the user one URL), compile-a-world (the meta-compiler skill — the nomicon folds on itself), and ingest-into-nomicon-app.

entries.title: vatt-ghern
entries.description: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entries.title: herdr-pm
entries.description: The socket-native herdr-pm engine + three role skills: a CEO that puts a manager beside every active agent pane and supervises the fleet, a manager that dispatches plan-first workers and verifies every 'done' with real evidence, and the worker lane discipline — all driven by one stdlib Python file over herdr's protocol-15 socket API.

entries.title: dudelis-skills
entries.description: dudelis-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: basemind
entries.description: Full AI context layer over MCP — tree-sitter code-map, document RAG (PDF/Office/HTML/email + OCR + reranker), shared agent memory, on-demand web crawl, git history + blame + per-symbol diff. 300+ languages, 10+ coding-agent harnesses, content-addressed Fjall + LanceDB.

entries.title: author-workflow
entries.description: Teach a shell-capable agent (Claude Code or Codex) to author a dynamic multi-agent workflow at runtime — a Starlark program over the harness runtime — and run it with `harness workflow run-script`. Bundles the author-workflow skill from skills/.

entries.title: bigid
entries.description: The BigID plugin includes the official BigID MCP connector with a set of optimized skills to help explore, manage, and action your data

entries.title: harness
entries.description: Personal development workflow for Claude Code: 8-step skill chain from ideation to shipping (ideate → product-plan → dev-plan → prototype → implement → qa → update-docs → ship), plus a task skill for small changes on shipped products, a next-step recommender, handoff, zoom-out, reusable subagents, and shared global rules.

entries.title: fusebase-flow
entries.description: The framework client-facing teams use to build internal and client apps with AI. Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entries.title: arboretum
entries.description: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.
